platforms.description: Platforms whose placements should be returned. Order is preserved in the response.

placements.description: Optional placement-level filter. When supplied, only the matching placements are returned (regardless of which platforms are in `platforms[]`). Known placement ids: meta-feed, meta-stories, meta-reels, meta-right-column, meta-marketplace, meta-messenger, google-search, google-display, google-youtube-instream, google-youtube-bumper, google-discovery, google-performance-max, linkedin-feed, linkedin-message, tiktok-feed, tiktok-spark, x-timeline, x-explore, pinterest-feed, pinterest-search, snapchat-feed, snapchat-stories, reddit-feed, reddit-promoted-post, amazon-display, amazon-video, amazon-audio.
